llmHandoff.task: Review this committee feedback and rewrite the document for the identified audience while preserving factual integrity.

targetAudience.name: General Counsel

priorities: Reducing litigation risk from inconsistent opinions
concerns: Liability if the system surfaces the wrong precedent
Political optics of AI replacing lawyers

Increase audience specificity and objection preemption.
